title: cyathea ctenitoides
intro: Cyathea ctenitoides, also known as the mountain fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is often found growing in the wild on rocky outcrops and mountain slopes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea ctenitoides include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil.
